title: Crafty's Collection
description: A vanilla+ pack focused on exploration and building. Huge variety in world generation.
body:
![Sunset over a tropical rainforest biome with a desert temple in the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2332eb62b3f63c5a8e707b76f3e8c25a18334a91_0.webp)
## Overview
Crafty's Collection is a Vanilla+ pack with a heavy focus on adventure and building. I've been wanting a relatively light pack to play with some friends, and after searching for a bit I decided to make my own. This pack is made with small-scale multiplayer in mind but will be fun both singleplayer and on a large server. Some of the mods include:
### World Generation / Ambience
- Alex's Caves / Mobs
- Terralith + Incendium
- Assorted Team Abnormals mods (e.g. Environmental, Autumnity)
- When Dungeons Arise
- most YUNG's structure revamp mods
### Gameplay
- Origins Forge + Medieval Origins Revival
- Artifacts
- Farmer's Delight + Neapolitan
- Mowzie's Mobs
### Quality of Life
- Deepslate Tweaks
- Carry On
- Veinminer
- Corpse
### Multiplayer / Fun
- Emotecraft
- No Chat Reports
- Simple Voice Chat
- Lootr
- Immersive Melodies
### Performance
- Embeddium + Embeddium Extra
- Leaves Be Gone
- Not Enough Crashes

## Attribution
Non-modrinth sources requiring credit:
- [When Dungeons Arise](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise)
